title: Otohime Is Shot
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Queen Otohime, Royal Guards, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5. The core beat is otohime is shot.
scene: The scene follows otohime is shot, keeping the focus on Queen Otohime, Royal Guards, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5.

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: Coming through! Coming through! Everyone place your signatures into this box!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Your majesty... I see you are overcome by emotion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please, take a seat and rest.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come, everyone!! This is the place to show your support for our Queen's Passionate endeavour!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: UNAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHA!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: On this day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OTOHIME'S SEVEN LONG YEARS OF STRUGGGLE FINALLY BORE FRUIT.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The people of her kingdom ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Showed the deep love they held for their queen.

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: ... For days, the Plaza was filled with people from across the land, eager to submit their signatures for Otohime's cause.

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: Signatures over here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It was in that moment ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that I found the courage and assurance in myself that this country can truly change ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: "That moment"?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes... that day, when the sea kings peered into the island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, yes...!! That certainly was a big surprise!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: It was Shirahoshii who called them, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We Merfolk have the ability to understand the hearts of the ocean's fish, and to communicate with them, yes?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But no mermaid has ever been able to communicate with those gigantic sea kings.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That is beyond even your father, Neptune...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the only person on this island able to communicate with whales.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, according to the records of the Royal Family ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once in every few centuries, a mermaid.is born...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...with the ability to understand and communicate with even the mighty sea kings.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...a mermaid who is able...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...to speak with the sea kings ?!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: And you're saying that's Shirahoshii, Mother?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oh, MYY!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I... I'd love to be able to ride on a sea king's back one day!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: It is further told that one will appear with the power to guide that mermaid - to guide Shirahoshii. To show her the right path, and the correct way to use her ability.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it is said that when that time comes, a great change will come upon the world....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The world ?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this is true, then I feel certain that our island, too, will see great change...

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Then maybe it'll help what you're trying to do, Mother ....!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I feel certain of it. The power of love...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Can save thousands of lives if the will is strong enough...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: If used wrongly, the power that Shirahoshii holds is great enough ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to sink the entire world beneath the waves....!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: And yet, even Shirahoshii herself is still unaware of her ability...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And she is unable to control it.

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: If anything were to happen to send Shirahoshii into an even greater state of shock than she experienced that day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...it is possible that, in her current state, she would instinctively cause the sea kings to go on a mighty rampage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Eh?!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: If she did that, fish-man Island would be squashed flat! What should we do, Mother?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For the moment, I will do everything in my power to ensure that this does not happen...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I ask that you, my sons, grow up to become fine warriors...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And that you use that strength...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...To protect your sister with your lives!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Yes, Mother!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But of course!!!

dialogue.speaker: Koala
dialogue.text: Thank you!!

summary: Otohime Is Shot. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
